appliedUpdates.description: Restarted discovery_worker service to load code from commit 8c4186c (intent rejection) and 55c3570 (grounded HTML quality + multi-signal dedupe)

previousRound.notes: VAL-API-006 and VAL-API-008 failed due to stale worker code. VAL-DATA-006 and VAL-DATA-007 were pending but not tested in round 1.

notes: All assertions for milestone input-quality-hardening-followup now pass. Round 2 re-tested VAL-API-006 and VAL-API-008 after worker restart and both passed. VAL-DATA-006 and VAL-DATA-007 were validated via unit tests in grounded-search.test.ts which explicitly name the VAL codes. All 137 browser-use-discovery tests pass.
